view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for various field types is satisfied as evidenced by the custom fields created.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for various field types is satisfied as evidenced by the custom fields created.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for field types by referencing the linked use case, which explicitly lists the field types: text (Pet name), number (Weight), boolean (Aggressive behavior), dropdown (Breed, Preferred groomer), and multi-select (Coat condition). This direct mapping of field types to the requirement confirms that the requirement is fully covered. No gaps were identified in the evidence provided.
